commands.review_summary:
The PR generates flat `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts` declarations, repoints package-boundary aliases, excludes `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` from packaged output and inventory, and adds installed-tarball TypeScript smoke coverage.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +98, Config +7, Other +150. Total +264 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a cleanup PR rather than a user bug report; the relevant behavior is package-build and installed-type-smoke proof. Source inspection confirms the changed package, inventory, release-check, and alias paths.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer PR handling and compatibility-sensitive package changes need maintainer review, final CI, and stacked-branch landing judgment rather than an automated repair job.

target.title: Refactor plugin SDK declarations for flat package types
target.body:
## Summary

- Stack this declaration-layout refactor on #87120, which already removes the Vitest-backed test helper SDK subpaths from public package exports.
- Generate bundled flat plugin SDK declarations directly under `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts` instead of shipping public shims that point into `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**`.
- Move extension package-boundary aliases to the flat declaration layout while preserving private local QA aliases that are intentionally not public package exports.
- Exclude `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` from the npm package, keep `dist/postinstall-inventory.json` aligned with that exclusion, and add installed-tarball TypeScript consumer proof to `release-check`.

## Size Impact

Measured after `pnpm build` with `npm --silent pack --json --ignore-scripts --pack-destination <tmp>`.

Baseline is #87120's post-cleanup pack measurement, since that PR removes public test-helper exports before this refactor applies.

- #87120 baseline: tarball 17,603,764 bytes; unpacked 78,101,717 bytes; 12,470 files; `dist/plugin-sdk` 4,605 files / 6,990,145 bytes.
- This PR stacked on #87120: tarball 16,903,525 bytes; unpacked 75,195,243 bytes; 9,016 files; `dist/plugin-sdk` 1,150 files / 3,738,782 bytes.
- Net vs #87120: tarball -700,239 bytes; unpacked -2,906,474 bytes; file count -3,454; `dist/plugin-sdk` -3,455 files / -3,251,363 bytes.

The packed artifact now has `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0. The generated `dist/postinstall-inventory.json` also has 0 `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` entries. The deep tree removal is partially offset by 843 flat root declaration chunks totaling 3,321,723 bytes, which keep public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports resolving from the installed package.

## Verification

- `pnpm build`
- `npm --silent pack --json --ignore-scripts --pack-destination <tmp>`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-inventory-fix-2 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/package-dist-inventory.test.ts test/release-check.test.ts test/scripts/check-openclaw-package-tarball.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/release-check.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
  - provider: blacksmith-testbox through Crabbox
  - Testbox id: `tbx_01kskzc6gzwvnxa2zy0e4fbr90`
  - Result: 108 plugins compiled; exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Installed package no longer ships the unnecessary deep `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` declaration tree while public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports continue resolving, and package inventory no longer references omitted deep SDK declarations.
Real environment tested: Local macOS Node 24 build/package checks plus Blacksmith Testbox Linux package-boundary compile through Crabbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.
Evidence after fix: npm pack measurement shows `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0; generated `dist/postinstall-inventory.json` has 0 `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` entries; release-check installed a packed tarball into temporary consumer projects and ran TypeScript against representative SDK imports; Testbox compiled 108 plugin package-boundary projects.
Observed result after fix: Build, release-check, focused Vitest/tarball/inventory tests, and Testbox package-boundary compile passed.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check`/full test suite was not run locally; package-boundary broad proof was run remotely instead.
